name: Secrets Vault
description: AES-256-GCM at-rest secrets store with deposit_secret tool and automatic redaction in session history. The agent receives an opaque handle; the plaintext only re-materializes inside tool calls that explicitly request it.

secretsDir.description: Directory for the encrypted secrets vault (default: ~/.openclaw/state/secrets)

telegramBotToken.description: Telegram bot token for deposit confirmations (optional)

telegramAlertChatId.description: Telegram chat ID to confirm deposits to (optional)
